evidence_direction_note: Substrate failure: experiment script does not call agent.update_residue() in its training/eval loops, so e3.post_action_update() and update_running_variance() are never invoked. _running_variance stays at precision_init=0.5 for every step in every seed; current_precision = 1/(0.5+1e-6) = 1.999996 (matches manifest mean_precision exactly). ARC-016 was therefore not actually tested -- the precision signal was a constant in both arms, so dACC had nothing to differentiate. Reclassified non_contributory rather than 'weakens'. Same root cause cluster as EXQ-514d/514e/536 (rv pinned at 0.5).
